mapper.select: SELECT customer_id , customer_name , customer_address , customer_email , customer_job , customer_account_number , customer_risk_type FROM customer_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
SELECT customer_resident_number , customer_phone_number FROM customer_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM exchange_wallet WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}) THEN '외환 지갑' ELSE NULL END AS exchange_wallet,
CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}) THEN '입출금계좌' ELSE NULL END AS account_tbl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fund_account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}) THEN '펀드계좌' ELSE NULL END AS fund_account_tbl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM loan_status_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND loan_progress = '승인') THEN '대출상품' ELSE NULL END AS loan_status_tbl,
CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM deposit_account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}) THEN '예적금계좌' ELSE NULL END AS deposit_account_tbl
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND customer_status = '가입'
